profile.name: Rohit Aggarwal
profile.title: AI/ML Engineer | M.Tech CS-AI, IIT Roorkee
profile.tagline: Applied AI engineer specializing in retrieval-augmented generation, tool-using agents, evaluation and safety regression, recommender systems, and simulation.

education.institution: Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi (IIITD)

publications.title: RideCopilot: An Agentic, LLM-Based Conversational System for Multi-Stakeholder Taxi Operations and Fleet Management with Time Series Models
publications.venue: Accepted to ATT 2026: 14th International Workshop on Agents in Traffic and Transportation, with AAMAS 2026, Paphos, Cyprus

publications.title: Global Awareness Landscape for Ailments: A Twitter Based Microscopic View Into Thought Processes of People
publications.authors: Toshniwal, D.; Somani, S.; Aggarwal, R.; Malik, P.

experience.detail: Built an agentic copilot that converts passenger, driver, and operator language into bounded dispatch updates with solver-grounded optimization and forecast-aware repositioning.
